rationale: Rejected against the exact Amul Malai Paneer package image. The nutrition declaration is already per 100 g (312 kcal, 20 g protein, 4 g carbohydrate, 4 g total sugar, 24 g fat, 14.4 g saturated fat, and 24 mg sodium), but the candidate treats it as a 50 g serving and doubles the values to 624 kcal and 40 g protein per 100 g.

Verified against the exact Stonefire Naan Crisps package image. The complete 30 g row declares 130 kcal, 2 g protein, 18 g carbohydrate, 1 g sugar, 5 g fat, 0.5 g saturated fat, 1 g fibre, and 230 mg sodium; every supported value converts exactly to the candidate per-100-g row.

Rejected against the exact Deep Indian Kitchen Chicken Curry Momos label. The candidate treats the 170-calorie Per Half Package column as a 192 g serving, but 192 g is the full dumpling weight and the declared serving also includes 29 g chutney; the label's Per Serving column is 330 calories, so the candidate conversion basis is wrong.

Rejected against the exact Moo Pro Max Salted Caramel Yoghurt label. The label supplies a direct 110 kcal per 100 g value, while the candidate prefers a 187 kcal per 170 g serving conversion and records 109.70363288718929 kcal per 100 g.

Rejected against the exact Whyte Farms Paneer label. The package declares 0.0 g added sugar but does not declare total sugar; the candidate incorrectly maps added sugar into the supported total-sugar field as 0 g.
Rejected against the exact MuscleTech NitroTech label. The direct per-100-g row declares 4.4 g total sugars and 233 mg sodium, but both supported fields are absent from the candidate.

Verified against the exact Stonefire Naan Rounds package image. The complete 60 g row declares 170 kcal, 5 g protein, 31 g carbohydrate, 3 g sugar, 4 g fat, 1 g saturated fat, 3 g fibre, and 480 mg sodium; every supported value converts exactly to the candidate per-100-g row.
